page_info: The page displays the results of a Juxtastat game. It shows a score of 'Excellent! 😊 4/5' and a visual representation of the answers '🟩🟩🟩🟥🟩'. There is a section showing the 'Next quiz in 03:32:40', and 'Your Statistics' including 'Played: 1', 'Mean score: 4.00', and 'Win Rate (3+): 100%'. It also lists detailed comparisons for each question.
thoughts: The presence of 'Juxtastat Excellent! 😊 4/5' and the colored squares '🟩🟩🟩🟥🟩' clearly indicates that a game has been played and its results are being displayed. The 'Next quiz in 03:32:40' further confirms that the daily game is over and a new one will be available later. The 'Your Statistics' section also shows that '1' game has been 'Played'. All these elements confirm that the user has completed the daily game.
